messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Create a sleek PowerPoint presentation for dealership managers in the Automotive industry detailing our electric vehicle transition roadmap, spanning exactly 15 slides with a modern theme using silver, red, and dark gray accents. Save the file as "EV_Transition.pptx". All content should be written in Chinese using 16:9 Widescreen slide size. Do not use any external APIs or web scraping; rely solely on locally generated placeholder data for automotive sales trends. When creating charts, you must use `XL_CHART_TYPE` (e.g., `XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE`) instead of importing or using `ChartType` from `pptx.enum.chart`. Before attempting to set the text of a slide's title shape, you must first verify that `slide.shapes.title is not None` and only then access `.text`. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. Code blocks must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text explanations must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


# ── Deck Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

COLORS = {
    "silver": "#C0C0C0",
    "red": "#E63946",
    "dark_gray": "#2B2D42",
    "white": "#FFFFFF",
    "light_gray": "#F8F9FA",
    "accent_blue": "#4A90E2",
}

FONT_PRIMARY = "Aptos"
FONT_FALLBACK = "Arial"
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
CARD_WIDTH = Inches(3.5)
CARD_HEIGHT = Inches(1.8)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.25)


# ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FFFFFF"):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18,
                 color="#2B2D42", bold=False, alignment=None):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    run = p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run()
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    run.font.bold = bold
    if alignment is not None:
        p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body="", bg_color="#FFFFFF"):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#E0E0E0")
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    if title or body:
        tf = shape.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True
        tf.margin_left = Inches(0.15)
        tf.margin_right = Inches(0.15)
        tf.margin_top = Inches(0.12)
        tf.margin_bottom = Inches(0.12)
        if title:
            p = tf.paragraphs[0]
            p.text = title
            run = p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run()
            run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
            run.font.size = Pt(14)
            run.font.bold = True
            run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(COLORS["dark_gray"])
        if body:
            p2 = tf.add_paragraph()
            p2.text = body
            run2 = p2.runs[0] if p2.runs else p2.add_run()
            run2.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
            run2.font.size = Pt(11)
            run2.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#555555")
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text):
    card = add_card(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(4.5), Inches(0.5),
                    title=label_text, bg_color=COLORS["red"])
    tf = card.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
    run = p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run()
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(COLORS["white"])
    return card


def add_footer(slide, text="EV Transition Roadmap | Confidential", font_size=10):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.6), Inches(7.0), Inches(4.5), Inches(0.3))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
    run = p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run()
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(COLORS["silver"])


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#F0F0F0")
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(COLORS["silver"])
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.6), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4),
                     "Image Placeholder", font_size=12, color="#999999")


def add_shape(slide, shape_type, left, top, width, height, fill_color=None, line_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(shape_type, left, top, width, height)
    if fill_color:
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(fill_color)
    else:
        shape.fill.background()
    if line_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(line_color)
    return shape


def add_line(slide, x1, y1, x2, y2, color="#E63946", width=0.5):
    connector = slide.shapes.add_connector(1, x1, y1, x2, y2)  # MSO_CONNECTOR.STRAIGHT
    connector.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    connector.line.width = Pt(width)


# ── Slide Builders ───────────────────────────────────────────────

def build_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, COLORS["dark_gray"])

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(2.0), Inches(11.3), Inches(1.5),
                 "电动汽车转型路线图", font_size=48, color=COLORS["white"], bold=True)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(3.6), Inches(11.3), Inches(1.2),
                 "经销商集团战略升级与电动化转型指南", font_size=24, color=COLORS["silver"])

    # decorative red line
    add_shape(slide, MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(1.0), Inches(5.0), Inches(3.0), Inches(0.06), fill_color=COLORS["red"])

    add_footer(slide, text="EV Transition Roadmap | 2024-2030", font_size=11)


def build_executive_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLORS["light_gray"])

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "执行摘要"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8),
                     "执行摘要", font_size=36, color=COLORS["dark_gray"], bold=True)

    # Key stats cards
    stats = [
        ("2030年预测销量", "增长450%", COLORS["red"]),
        ("市场份额目标", "70%电动化", COLORS["accent_blue"]),
        ("投资回报率", "18-25%", COLORS["dark_gray"]),
    ]
    for i, (title, value, accent) in enumerate(stats):
        x = Inches(0.6 + i * 4.3)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.5), CARD_WIDTH, CARD_HEIGHT, title=title, body=value, bg_color=COLORS["white"])

    # Intro paragraph
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(3.8), Inches(12), Inches(2.5),
                 "本路线图为汽车经销商提供全面的电动化转型指导，涵盖市场趋势分析、分阶段实施策略、财务规划及风险管理。通过系统化的转型路径，经销商可在未来十年内实现业务模式的全面升级，抓住电动汽车市场的巨大增长机遇。",
                 font_size=14, color="#555555")

    add_footer(slide)


def build_market_overview(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLORS["light_gray"])

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "市场概览"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8),
                     "市场概览", font_size=36, color=COLORS["dark_gray"], bold=True)

    # Stat cards
    stats = [
        ("全球EV销量", "1400万辆/年", COLORS["red"]),
        ("中国市场占比", "59%", COLORS["accent_blue"]),
        ("充电基础设施", "280万桩", COLORS["dark_gray"]),
    ]
    for i, (title, value, accent) in enumerate(stats):
        x = Inches(0.6 + i * 4.3)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.5), CARD_WIDTH, CARD_HEIGHT, title=title, body=value, bg_color=COLORS["white"])

    # Chart: EV sales trend
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["2020", "2021", "2022", "2023", "2024", "2025", "2026", "2027", "2028", "2029", "2030"]
    chart_data.add_series("全球EV销量 (百万辆)", (10, 14, 22, 32, 45, 65, 90, 120, 155, 195, 240))

    left = Inches(0.6)
    top = Inches(3.8)
    width = Inches(12.1)
    height = Inches(3.0)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)

    add_footer(slide)


def build_transition_phases(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLORS["light_gray"])

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "转型三阶段"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8),
                     "转型三阶段", font_size=36, color=COLORS["dark_gray"], bold=True)

    phases = [
        ("第一阶段：准备与规划\n2024-2025", "基础设施评估、充电设备安装、员工培训启动、试点车型引入"),
        ("第二阶段：试点运营\n2025-2026", "小规模EV库存、客户教育计划、售后服务体系建立、数据收集分析"),
        ("第三阶段：全面推广\n2027-2030", "全量EV产品线、数字化展厅升级、新能源服务生态构建、规模化运营"),
    ]
    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(phases):
        x = Inches(0.6 + i * 4.3)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.5), CARD_WIDTH, CARD_HEIGHT, title=title, body=body, bg_color=COLORS["white"])

    # Connecting arrows (decorative lines)
    for i in range(2):
        add_line(slide, Inches(4.3 + i * 4.3), Inches(2.4), Inches(4.55 + i * 4.3), Inches(2.4))

    add_footer(slide)


def build_financial_analysis(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLORS["light_gray"])

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "财务分析"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8),
                     "财务分析", font_size=36, color=COLORS["dark_gray"], bold=True)

    stats = [
        ("初始投资需求", "¥500-800万", COLORS["red"]),
        ("预计回本周期", "24-36个月", COLORS["accent_blue"]),
        ("年均营收增长", "+15-20%", COLORS["dark_gray"]),
    ]
    for i, (title, value, accent) in enumerate(stats):
        x = Inches(0.6 + i * 4.3)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.5), CARD_WIDTH, CARD_HEIGHT, title=title, body=value, bg_color=COLORS["white"])

    # Pie chart: Revenue mix projection
    pie_data = CategoryChartData()
    pie_data.categories = ["整车销售", "售后服务", "充电服务", "金融保险"]
    pie_data.add_series("2030年营收占比 (%)", [45, 28, 17, 10])

    left = Inches(6.5)
    top = Inches(3.8)
    width = Inches(6.3)
    height = Inches(3.0)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, left, top, width, height, pie_data)

    add_footer(slide)


def build_timeline(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLORS["light_gray"])

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "转型时间线"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8),
                     "转型时间线", font_size=36, color=COLORS["dark_gray"], bold=True)

    milestones = [
        ("Q1 2024", "启动评估"),
        ("Q3 2024", "基础设施规划"),
        ("Q1 2025", "试点项目启动"),
        ("Q4 2025", "首批EV交付"),
        ("Q2 2026", "全面库存转型"),
        ("Q4 2027", "数字化升级完成"),
        ("2030", "70% EV销售占比"),
    ]

    for i, (year, desc) in enumerate(milestones):
        x = Inches(0.6 + i * 1.85)
        y = Inches(1.5)
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(1.7), Inches(1.2), title=year, body=desc, bg_color=COLORS["white"])

    # Horizontal line connecting milestones
    add_line(slide, Inches(0.6 + 0.85), Inches(2.1), Inches(0.6 + 6 * 1.85 - 0.85), Inches(2.1))

    add_footer(slide)


def build_implementation_steps(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLORS["light_gray"])

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "实施步骤"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8),
                     "实施步骤", font_size=36, color=COLORS["dark_gray"], bold=True)

    steps = [
        ("1", "基础设施评估与规划"),
        ("2", "充电设备安装部署"),
        ("3", "员工技术培训启动"),
        ("4", "试点车型引入销售"),
        ("5", "售后服务体系建立"),
        ("6", "数字化展厅升级"),
    ]

    for i, (num, desc) in enumerate(steps):
        col = i % 3
        row = i // 3
        x = Inches(0.6 + col * 4.3)
        y = Inches(1.5 + row * 2.8)
        add_card(slide, x, y, CARD_WIDTH, Inches(2.5), title=desc, bg_color=COLORS["white"])

    add_footer(slide)


def build_risk_management(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLORS["light_gray"])

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "风险管理"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8),
                     "风险管理", font_size=36, color=COLORS["dark_gray"], bold=True)

    risks = [
        ("市场风险", "EV需求波动"),
        ("政策风险", "补贴退坡影响"),
        ("供应链风险", "电池供应不稳定"),
        ("技术风险", "充电标准变化"),
        ("人才风险", "技能缺口"),
        ("竞争风险", "新进入者冲击"),
    ]

    for i, (title, desc) in enumerate(risks):
        col = i % 3
        row = i // 3
        x = Inches(0.6 + col * 4.3)
        y = Inches(1.5 + row * 2.8)
        add_card(slide, x, y, CARD_WIDTH, Inches(2.5), title=title, body=desc, bg_color=COLORS["white"])

    add_footer(slide)


def build_success_metrics(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLORS["light_gray"])

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "成功指标"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8),
                     "成功指标", font_size=36, color=COLORS["dark_gray"], bold=True)

    stats = [
        ("EV销量增长率", "+450%", COLORS["red"]),
        ("客户满意度", "92分", COLORS["accent_blue"]),
        ("运营效率提升", "+35%", COLORS["dark_gray"]),
    ]
    for i, (title, value, accent) in enumerate(stats):
        x = Inches(0.6 + i * 4.3)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.5), CARD_WIDTH, CARD_HEIGHT, title=title, body=value, bg_color=COLORS["white"])

    # Line chart: KPI progress
    line_data = CategoryChartData()
    line_data.categories = ["2024", "2025", "2026", "2027", "2028", "2029", "2030"]
    line_data.add_series("EV销量占比 (%)", [5, 15, 30, 45, 55, 65, 70])

    left = Inches(6.5)
    top = Inches(3.8)
    width = Inches(6.3)
    height = Inches(3.0)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, left, top, width, height, line_data)

    add_footer(slide)


def build_case_study(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLORS["light_gray"])

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "案例研究"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8),
                     "案例研究", font_size=36, color=COLORS["dark_gray"], bold=True)

    # Before/After cards
    before = [
        ("转型前 (2023)", "EV销量占比: 5%", "员工培训: 无", "充电设施: 0台"),
    ]
    after = [
        ("转型后 (2026)", "EV销量占比: 45%", "员工认证: 100%", "充电设施: 50台"),
    ]

    for i, items in enumerate(before + after):
        x = Inches(0.6 + i * 6.3)
        y = Inches(1.5)
        title_text = items[0]
        body_text = "\n".join(items[1:])
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(6.0), Inches(2.8), title=title_text, body=body_text, bg_color=COLORS["white"])

    # Results card
    results = [
        ("营收增长", "+35%"),
        ("客户满意度", "94分"),
        ("员工留存率", "96%"),
        ("碳排放减少", "-40%"),
    ]
    for i, (title, value) in enumerate(results):
        x = Inches(0.6 + i * 3.25)
        y = Inches(4.8)
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(3.0), Inches(1.8), title=title, body=value, bg_color=COLORS["white"])

    add_footer(slide)


def build_technology_roadmap(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLORS["light_gray"])

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "技术路线图"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8),
                     "技术路线图", font_size=36, color=COLORS["dark_gray"], bold=True)

    techs = [
        ("内燃机车辆", "当前主流\n传统销售模式"),
        ("混合动力车型", "过渡方案\n降低排放"),
        ("纯电动车型", "核心产品\n零排放出行"),
        ("智能网联EV", "未来方向\n自动驾驶集成"),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(techs):
        x = Inches(0.6 + i * 3.25)
        y = Inches(1.5)
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(3.0), Inches(2.8), title=title, body=body, bg_color=COLORS["white"])

    # Connecting arrows
    for i in range(3):
        add_line(slide, Inches(3.65 + i * 3.25), Inches(2.9), Inches(3.9 + i * 3.25), Inches(2.9))

    add_footer(slide)


def build_training_programs(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLORS["light_gray"])

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "培训计划"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8),
                     "培训计划", font_size=36, color=COLORS["dark_gray"], bold=True)

    programs = [
        ("EV技术基础", "电池原理\n电机系统\n高压安全"),
        ("客户教育", "续航讲解\n充电指导\n使用培训"),
        ("销售技巧", "EV产品知识\n竞品对比\n试驾流程"),
        ("售后服务", "维护保养\n故障诊断\n软件升级"),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(programs):
        col = i % 2
        row = i // 2
        x = Inches(0.6 + col * 6.3)
        y = Inches(1.5 + row * 2.8)
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(6.0), Inches(2.5), title=title, body=body, bg_color=COLORS["white"])

    add_footer(slide)


def build_support_resources(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLORS["light_gray"])

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "支持资源"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8),
                     "支持资源", font_size=36, color=COLORS["dark_gray"], bold=True)

    resources = [
        ("制造商合作", "专属转型团队\n技术支持热线"),
        ("政府补贴", "购置补贴政策\n税收优惠减免"),
        ("行业协会", "最佳实践分享\n行业数据报告"),
        ("技术伙伴", "充电设备供应商\n软件平台服务商"),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(resources):
        col = i % 2
        row = i // 2
        x = Inches(0.6 + col * 6.3)
        y = Inches(1.5 + row * 2.8)
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(6.0), Inches(2.5), title=title, body=body, bg_color=COLORS["white"])

    add_footer(slide)


def build_call_to_action(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLORS["red"])

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(2.0), Inches(11.3), Inches(1.5),
                 "立即行动", font_size=48, color=COLORS["white"], bold=True)

    actions = [
        "预约转型咨询会议",
        "获取定制化评估报告",
        "加入试点项目计划",
        "访问资源中心下载指南",
        "联系专属顾问团队",
    ]

    for i, action in enumerate(actions):
        y = Inches(3.8 + i * 0.5)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), y, Inches(10), Inches(0.4),
                     "▸ " + action, font_size=20, color=COLORS["white"])

    add_footer(slide, text="EV Transition Roadmap | 2024-2030", font_size=11)


def build_thank_you_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLORS["dark_gray"])

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(2.5), Inches(11.3), Inches(1.5),
                 "感谢您的关注", font_size=48, color=COLORS["white"], bold=True)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(4.0), Inches(11.3), Inches(1.2),
                 "开启您的电动化转型之旅", font_size=24, color=COLORS["silver"])

    # decorative red line
    add_shape(slide, MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(1.0), Inches(5.4), Inches(3.0), Inches(0.06), fill_color=COLORS["red"])

    add_footer(slide, text="EV Transition Roadmap | 2024-2030", font_size=11)


# ── Main ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    build_title_slide(prs)
    build_executive_summary(prs)
    build_market_overview(prs)
    build_transition_phases(prs)
    build_financial_analysis(prs)
    build_timeline(prs)
    build_implementation_steps(prs)
    build_risk_management(prs)
    build_success_metrics(prs)
    build_case_study(prs)
    build_technology_roadmap(prs)
    build_training_programs(prs)
    build_support_resources(prs)
    build_call_to_action(prs)
    build_thank_you_slide(prs)

    prs.save("EV_Transition.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
